item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
got yourself a keeper
made by fellow dumper xbadxfaeriex
incredible
not the biggest cookie dough fan but i've wondered this
going to have to respectfully decline. mostly bc of the creed, also looks like a ton of pepper on the food
mmm hmm
as is tradition
evil empire
hate when this happens to me
i.. don't know what any of this means..
i guess
i'd be all over this if i had some shrooms
and what a dream it is
wow. sorry
wonder if she looks at memes from other dudes
sort of?
that's my time... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: When your dog is a Copycat .
item.description: He's just imitating you. A new study reveals that our canine pals are capable of copying our behavior as long as 10 minutes after it's happened. The ability is considered mentally demanding and, until this discovery, something that only humans and apes were known to do :)
item.dc:creator: Iullyiullyus

item.title: Guy proposed and her energy was incredible
item.dc:creator: thespacewired

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1284 (cultural introspection metal band)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Also me with cinematography.
I wish I was normal and neurotypical then I wouldn't have all these fears for my friends and the world I live in and I could just be... normal?
Please, Aliens, wipe us out since that stupid small asteroid isn't anymore.
We killed the Lord God Bird. A bird that literally was seen as an embodiment of the divine by many native peoples in the southeast. And we cut down their trees and killed their swamps.
Just Fourth Crusade things.
We need to rise up and march on DC and hang these traitors to the state... and build a new constitution with true equality for all.
Azdharchid Eclipse
And how's them egg prices going, buddy? Was it worth losing your Trans friends and National Parks for it?
In preparation for a future attempt at an updated version of my Ea-Naşir inspired mead, I've built a playlist of Sumerian/Akkadian music reconstruction, and I've called it "Sumer-time Sadness." Shit like this is why I will die alone, probably executed by Republicans for refusing to bow to their king.
No kings and no lords on earth or under heaven. Would love to see a modern take of this scene play out in a capital city in a certain place.
Death. A sword day, a red day, ere the sun rises. Death, fire, and fell slaughter.
Man, if I had this jar... well, honestly if I had both, and people actually put fucking money in it, I'd be able to probably afford a camping van and would be able to flee at the drop of a hat.
Accurate.
Also accurate.
Both sexual and non sexual shenanigans, yes.
We need more protagonists, I can't do this moral support alone forever without someone DOING something.
It's exhausting. It's absolutely exhausting. Some days, I'm so exhausted I don't even want to do meme posts. But, this is one of the few ways I know how to fight. So I post. Because... maybe my post will support someone who is doing more than I can on most days to fight fascism.
Woke up from a nightmare where I was camping as part of a work team-building exercise near Williams, AZ and a forest fire started in the near distance. Embers and burning branches kept falling into the camp from above, and it seemed like I was the only one who cared to stomp them out. Finally, we marched to the train tracks to be evacuated by train, and the fire kept approaching and I realized I left a book behind in my tent, but at least had not lost my camera or backup book. Alarm woke me up before a final resolution but BOY HOWDY do we feel uneasy today. Lots more little details within the dream about/with little conversations, like me screaming at coworkers to help me stomp out embers and them refusing because "this isn't the real world anyway and nothing matters in it" Anyway.
I hate being awakened mid-dream, though, because for the rest of the day, nothing feels real, and I'm a lot more tired than usual.
There is an Old English version of this song that lives in my head right now: https://youtu.be/EA2vzk52UZc?si=XAlKTAxEGyFo5U4P Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on!
Tenontosaurus
Cake without eggs.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning. Step up. [Coughing noises]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Luna Snow is never cold! - Marvel Rivals cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/Nqnsu4INpJg I did a cosplay of Luna Snow in the snow :) She's a character from the game Marvel Rivals. The wind was a little spicy especially having my belly and thighs exposed to it, but I didn't get sick! Have a good day everyone! -Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: RIP: Michelle Tachenberg
item.description: Cause unknown but given recent liver problems I would guess that had something to do with it. I liked the fact that she helped identify Joss W from Firefly as being out of line/MeTo stuff. https://variety.com/2025/film/news/michelle-trachtenberg-dead-gossip-girl-buffy-the-vampire-slayer-actor-1236321301/

item.title: And another RANDUMBP! w/sound
item.description:
Muscle memory?
At least his helmet was secured.
Earbuds in, head down.
Passengers get out to help.
FAFO'd and hit the road.
And as a final bonus, a (soundless) self-administered head shot.
item.dc:creator: LeonSpinks

item.title: ultra-bright headlights
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Congrats antivaxxers!
item.description: LUBBOCK, Texas (AP) — A child who wasn’t vaccinated died in a measles outbreak in rural West Texas, state officials said Wednesday, the first U.S. death from the highly contagious respiratory disease since 2015. The school-aged child had been hospitalized and died Tuesday night amid the widespread outbreak, Texas’ largest in nearly 30 years. Since it began last month, a rash of 124 cases has erupted across nine counties. The Texas Department of State Health Services and Lubbock health officials confirmed the death to The Associated Press. The Lubbock hospital where the child had been treated — and where most measles patients have been hospitalized during the outbreak — didn’t respond to a request for comment. https://apnews.com/article/measles-outbreak-west-texas-death-rfk-41adc66641e4a56ce2b2677480031ab9?
item.dc:creator: stephlin15

item.title: We can't love dogs enough
item.description:
The dog, sensing that his owner is about to have a seizure, first makes his owner sit on the floor, then gets water from the cupboard,
He then finds her medicine and gives it to her, then makes his owner lie on the floor.
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: What the fuck is he wearing??
item.dc:creator: JennCantTellTime

item.title: [OC] I drew our D&D party as a birthday present for the DM! Not AI, includes the drawing process.
item.description:
Two dice in the bottom right corner both rolled 1s so surely nothing bad will happen soon. Characters from top left clockwise: Zernak: dragonborn cleric and master pirate. Usually he's the designated navigator but right now nobody's listening to his ramblings. Aelia Verona: halfling rogue who's boldly and drunkenly steering the ship to places no man has gone before. She's holding a bottle of wine and will not part with it willingly. Ambrosus: dwarven warrior and the resident murder hobo. He was supposed to lean on a boarding sabre but I ran out of space. Currently armed with a flintlock pistol. Claudian: human bard and DM, usually seen facepalming at his players' antics. Has a few handy potions in a bandolier on his chest.
Drawing process
item.dc:creator: sarasti
